description: §38.13.3 — an `<onchange>` missing the `Deleted` arm (non-exhaustive over the synthesized RowChange's three variants) fires E-MATCH-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE, reusing the §18 exhaustiveness family (no dedicated code). Proves the synthesized RowChange discriminant is recognized and its arms are exhaustiveness-checked.
rationale: §38.13.3: the `<onchange>` arms SHALL be exhaustive over RowChange's three variants (Inserted / Updated / Deleted, §38.13.2) — reusing the §18 exhaustiveness family. A missing variant (no wildcard) fires E-MATCH-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE.
